untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calendar-based entry conditions (February or March) and inter-contract spread analysis (July vs September soybean futures differential). The backtest engine indicators do not support: (1) calendar/month-based filtering, (2) multi-leg futures spread pricing or differential tracking, or (3) contract-month arbitrage mechanics. The signal also references AUTHOR_SILENT exit conditions with no explicit reversal target provided in standard price terms. A proper implementation requires contract-aware spread analytics beyond single-series price indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: entry conditions assume July contract at ~600 cents and September at ~606 cents (6-cent differential), with exit when July reaches 706+ cents (100-cent reversal). However, this cannot properly replicate the calendar-month gating and spread-tracking logic essential to this strategy. Recommend: (1) implement calendar filters in backtest engine, (2) add multi-leg spread indicators, (3) clarify exit condition from original source.
